response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with deep experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no evidence of 5–10 years of C++ development on Windows, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure. The only C/C++ experience listed is a 7-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, which falls far short of the required hands-on expertise.
strengths: Solid overall software engineering background with 10+ years across multiple stacks
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, dojos) and developer tooling experience
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a measurement IDE
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ experience; only ~7 months over a decade ago
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; primarily MongoDB and generic SQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain exposure
